semantic_description: The function scans a null-terminated char array from index 0 using an unbounded while loop. It returns 0 immediately if it finds a character outside the lowercase ASCII range 97..122; if it reaches the terminating 0 after scanning all elements of l, it returns 1. The contract requires all positions 0 <= k < n in l to be nonzero and the heap resource CharArray::full(s, n + 1, app(l, cons(0, nil))). The function does not modify memory and must preserve the same char array resource.
